description_text: 4pcs/set Universal Car Front Red Glossy Carbon Look Bumper Lip Diffuser Splitter Fins Body Spoiler Canards Valence Chin Feature: Quick and easy way to add a Body side Wing spoiler/lip to virtually any. Car for an aggressive sporty look. Waterproof. Never Fade, Never Rust. Easy to install. Specification: Dimension: See Pictures Type: Front Bumper Canards Splitters Placement on Vehicle: Left, Right, Front, Upper, Lower Manufacturer Part Number: Universal For Carfront Bumper Canards Splitters Other Part Number: 4pcs Front Bumper Canard The installation method: 1.Pls use alcohol or agent to clean the position of the installation. (to make sure it without the grease.Wax or dust etc.) 2.pls ensure the position of installation can be completely fit the. 3.The installation have been completed, DIY installation. Package Included: 4 x Front Bumper Canard (2 Wide + 2 Narrow) How to order 1、Choose product 2、Buy it now 3、Make payment 4、Shipment 5、Delivery Payment 1.We accept PayPal only. 2.All major credit cards are accepted through secure payment processor PayPal. 3.Payment must be received within 7 business days of auction closing. 4.We ship to your eBay or Paypal address. Please make sure your eBay and Paypal address is correct before you pay. Delivery details 1.We ship to your eBay or Paypal address. Please make sure your eBay and Paypal address is correct before you pay. 2.Items will be shipped within 1-3 business day when we received payment. 3.Delivery time depends on destination and other factors; 4.International buyers please note: a.Import duties, taxes and charges are not included in the item price or shipping charges. These charges are buyer’s responsibility. We will try our best to reduce the risk of the custom duties. b.Please check with your country's customs office to determine what these additional costs will be prior to buying. Contact us If you have any questions or need any help from us, please feel free to contact us .We will try our best to reply you within 24 hours. If for any reason your are unsatisfactory with you purchase, please contact us to solve the problems before leaving negative feedback, and we will try our best to satisfy each customer.Thank you for your understanding and support!!
